subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-27
subcodes.first_line: The essence of prophethood is one, just as the effect of one or more lights is that of one. If you want to see the light
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @rejection of Muhammad, @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering; rejection of Christ
